_comment: Cross-runtime example: register agent-extractor as a stdio MCP server. This is a documentation/example file, not loaded by the package. Copy the inner server block into your client's own config (Cursor: .cursor/mcp.json; Cline: cline_mcp_settings.json; Codex / Claude Desktop: their mcpServers block). The extract_* tools call a vision-language model, so set ANTHROPIC_API_KEY; list_schemas and info work without it.

agent-extractor._recommended: uvx launch straight from GitHub, no local clone or install needed.

agent-extractor-local-uvx._comment: If you have the repo checked out locally, point uvx at the path instead.

agent-extractor-local-python._comment: No uv? Run the module directly after `pip install -e .` (or `pip install -r requirements.txt`) in the repo. Set cwd to the repo root.
